title: CachePolicy
description: Semantic cache policy for chat requests.

backend.description: Cache backend used for matching requests.

enabled.description: When false the cache gate skips this policy. Lets operators stage a rule (write it, sanity-check it, then flip it on).

name.description: Operator-facing name; surfaces in metric labels + cache headers.

ttl_seconds.description: TTL hint in seconds. Per-policy TTL is honored by the cache backend on each entry. Default 3600 matches the cp-api validator.

CacheBackend.description: Cache backend choice for requests matched by a cache policy. `redis` requires `cache.redis`; otherwise matching requests are not cached.
